• Supports 5 selectable response styles: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, and roast
  • Renders 3D swirling purple/blue particle effects inside the ball using Three.js
  • Fetches AI-generated answers via the OpenRouter API with a Gemma 4 31B model
    onclick="askQuestion()"
    const MODEL = "google/gemma-4-31b-it:free"

This interactive Magic 8 Ball web app lets users input questions and select a response personality style. It features animated shaking effects, 3D particle visuals, and Tailwind CSS for responsive styling. AI-generated answers are fetched via the OpenRouter API and displayed inside the stylized ball.
